productDisplayName: Puma Men Lifestyle Knitted Dark Denim Sweaters
description: Composition Blue striped round neck sweater made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, flock print branding on left chest and has a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry Flaunt your love for simplicity and minimalism with this knit sweater from puma. The full sleeves and pure cotton fabric are sure to keep the winter chill at bay. Team this with jeans and casual shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
